title: Sales Engineer
description:
About the Position

We are seeking an energetic and customer-focused Sales Engineer to drive sales of the company’s products, integrated solutions, and services. In this role, you will support the Business Development team in preparing competitive proposals and tender submissions, gathering technical and costing information, and delivering pre-sales solutions tailored to client requirements.


Key Responsibilities

  • Promote and sell the company's products, integrated solutions, and services.
  • Work closely with the Business Development (BD) Manager in the preparation of tender bid submissions and proposals, including gathering functional and technical information and costing from in-house departments and/or from other vendors and OEM partners.
  • Responsible for pre-sales solution and proposal submission preparation for the assigned Request for Quote (RFQ) / Request for Proposal (RFP) from our clients, and promptly update the status to the relevant BD Manager
  • Participate in sales presentations, maintain technical application and presentation materials (such as digital campaigns and marketing collateral, including brochures, application notes, the company’s website, and LinkedIn).
  • Be involved and assist in the business division to explore new solutions/products to support the company’s business goals and to identify new business opportunities and expand our market share.

Requirement

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical/ Electronics/ Computer, equivalent Engineering discipline.
  • Relevant experiences in any of these SCADA/PLC solutions, Building Management System, relevant Operation Technologies (OT/IOT) solution for Power, Water, Transportation industries are preferred. Candidate with knowledge in OT network & cybersecurity solutions / Security & Surveillance solutions will have an advantage.
  • Strong communication and presentation skills.
  • Adaptable and self-driven to acquire new technologies.
  • Able to work independently and be goal-oriented for assigned tasks.
  • Able to exhibit good qualities of an effective team player when working within a team.

postedCompany.description: Willowglen Services Pte Ltd (“WSPL”) was established in Singapore, in the year of 1986 with a paid-out capital SGD $2,000,002. The company was established with the primary purpose to provide SCADA products & integrated SCADA, Security & IT solutions for our local & regional customers. WSPL is a leading SCADA company that has more than 30 years of experience to design, customize, and implement inclusive maintenance, to turnkey integrated SCADA, Security & IT solutions for various industries such as for the water & power utilities sectors, oil/gas production & distribution, building & facilities, security, transport, telecommunication and IT sector. WSPL is a subsidiary of the Willowglen Group of companies and with its corporate headquarter & R&D center - Willowglen MSC Berhad, a public-listed company located in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. With more than 30 years of experience. Willowglen’s capability goes beyond Scada and its related solutions. We are an ISO 9001 and OHSAS 18001:2007 certified company that is continuously evolving and innovating. With the implementation of international standards and quality, Our team recognizes the importance of accommodating rapidly changing business requirements, and also the increased demand in productivity. Willowglen Strength and Services   R&D   Maintenance Support   Engineering   Project Management
postedCompany.name: WILLOWGLEN SERVICES PTE LTD
